title: LED Dog Collar,Glow Light Collar for Dogs,Ultra Bright USB Rechargeable Cut to Fit Any Size - Rechargeable Battery - Increased Visibility & Safety For Your Pets(Pink)
features: 【CUT TO FIT ANY SIZE】 - NO MORE money wasted on the wrong size collar. Our premium quality dog collar can be cut to size in order to fit any dog breed and dimension (70cm length- cut down to size).

【HIGH VISIBILITY】 - Order with confidence and make sure your best friend is always visible to bikers, passers-by, drivers and other traffic participants.Your dog will be easy to find in the dark, highly visible to other walkers, joggers, cyclists, motorists etc.

【USB RECHARGEABLE】 - This LED collar for dogs comes with a smart USB rechargeable technology and lithium-ion battery, with a full charging time of 2 hours.The LED dog collar is water resistant and withstands any weather conditions!
【3 LIGHT SETTINGS】 - With a user-friendly design and a simple press of the button, you can adjust the light settings selecting from 3 different practical modes: fast flash, slow flash and constant.
【SATISFACTION GUARANTEED】 - If by some reason you’re not 100% satisfied with your purchase, just contact with us.Our money-back guarantee has got you covered!
description: We knows that every dog owner wants to keep their furry loved ones safe, seen and protected - during the day, but even more importantly at night, when they need our care most. Important Note: After cutted the dog collar,please push the cut end into the plastic battery case to reconnet,so that the collar can be locked tightly.It will be the best if you can push two side of the tube tightly before using. Settings: 1st Click - ON, FAST FLASH 2nd Click - STEADY FLASH 3rd Click - CONSTANT 4th Click – OFF Contents: 1xLED Dog Safety Collar (Rechargeable Lithium-ION Battery Included) 1xUSB Charging Cable Reap all the benefits this practical dog collar has to offer!
